title: Implement Queue using Stacks
coreIdea: Simulate FIFO queue behavior using two LIFO stacks, where one stack handles incoming elements and the other, refilled only when empty, handles outgoing elements in reversed (correct FIFO) order.
recognitionCues: asks to implement one data structure's behavior using only the other (queue via stacks, or stack via queues)
approach: Maintain input_stack and output_stack. Push always goes to input_stack. Pop/peek: if output_stack is empty, transfer all elements from input_stack to output_stack (reversing order), then pop/peek from output_stack.
